productName: Strawberry Lemon Haze ( S ) - Flipside Distillate Disposable 1g
description: An all-in-one sativa disposable vape preloaded with Strawberry Lemon Haze oil — no battery to charge, no cart to screw on, just unbox, draw, and enjoy. Grab-and-go convenience, a bright, zesty lemon flavor, delivering an active, daytime spark.
